name: ЧЕРТА
description: Однопальцевая боевая каллиграфия: три рывка оставляют линии, которые прорезают арену.
changelog: Rebuilt touch input around native iOS Touch Events while retaining Pointer Events for mouse and stylus.
Buffered up to three complete swipes across dash and detonation animations instead of discarding early input.
Added stale-touch recovery and made short intentional swipes register more reliably.
